title: Kitchen Orientation: Basic Tools
description: Learn to identify essential kitchen tools and their basic uses.

steps.instruction: Identify a pot. Pots are used for cooking liquids or stews.
Identify a pan. Pans are typically used for frying or sautéing.
Identify a knife. Use caution when handling knives.
Identify a cutting board. This protects your counters and provides a stable surface for cutting.

check.prompt: Do you have a cutting board? (Yes/No)
